docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANDRAY, JUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVA, DIMAS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115.00, PLTF OWED $850 FOR LAST MONTH RENT. PLTF DID NOT GIVE 30 DAYS WRITTEN NOTICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY CANDRAY, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVA, DIMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVA, DIMAS
